title: Green Salad with Pears, Walnuts, and Blue Cheese
description: A simple, elegant salad of mixed greens, ripe pears, walnuts, and blue cheese with a Dijon red wine vinaigrette. Dress only right before serving.

ingredients.name: mixed greens (spring mix, arugula, or a combination)
honey or maple syrup (optional, if pears aren't very sweet)

instructions.text: Make the dressing: whisk together olive oil, red wine vinegar, Dijon, salt, and pepper. Add honey or maple syrup if the pears aren't very sweet.
Slice pears thin and remove seeds. Toss briefly with a tiny splash of dressing to prevent browning.
Add greens to the serving bowl. Scatter pears over the top, then walnuts, then blue cheese crumbles (and red onion if using). Dress only right before serving and toss lightly.

notes:
Dress right before serving -- once dressed, the greens wilt quickly.

The small splash of dressing on the pears does double duty: prevents browning and pre-seasons them slightly.
